description:
Operating Area: Croatia, Montenegro, Slovenia, Venice

MADRA II is a beautifully crafted Ferretti 920 that brings together Italian style, space, and performance. Her layout includes a spacious full-beam master cabin on the main deck, with additional guest cabins that can be configured to suit different needs. Guests can enjoy a range of outdoor areas, from the large sun-soaked foredeck lounge to the shaded flybridge and beach club with a hydraulic swim platform. Whether you're looking to relax or stay active, MADRA II offers a great selection of water toys and stabilisers to ensure comfort both at sea and at anchor. Elegant, fast, and thoughtfully designed — she’s a perfect choice for a memorable charter.

crew.name: Manuel Milano
crew.bio:
Italian

Captain Manuel is a highly skilled and dedicated maritime professional with extensive experience leading and maintaining deck departments in impeccable condition. Known for his precision in engine compartment inspections, Manuel is an expert in passage planning, always prioritizing the safest and most efficient routes. Manuel places great emphasis on guest satisfaction, overseeing watersport activities and special requests with a positive, can-do attitude. Believing in the power of cooperation over competition, he fosters a healthy, harmonious work environment that cultivates productive business relationships and ensures the smooth running of every charter.

crew.name: Nina Boljevic
crew.bio:
Montenegrin

Nina is an experienced and adaptable sea stewardess with a strong foundation in Mediterranean yacht operations. With a keen sense of responsibility and excellent organizational skills, she excels in providing top-tier service in dynamic and fast-paced marine environments. Nina thrives in ensuring that high standards of cleanliness and hospitality are maintained throughout the yacht, prioritizing guest comfort at all times. Nina's passion for her role ensures that every detail is carefully attended to, contributing to the overall success of each charter, delivering a seamless and luxurious experience for guests.

crew.name: Katarina Krivanj
crew.bio:
Croatian

An experienced and detail-oriented Stewardess, Katarina brings elegance, precision, and a strong leadership presence to the interior operations of MADRA II. With a sharp eye for detail, she ensures the highest standards of service and cleanliness, leading the team to deliver an exceptional guest experience at all times. Having worked on various passenger and charter yachts as well as mini cruisers since 2022, Katarina is highly adaptable and skilled in all aspects of interior management. Beyond her stewardess role, she confidently steps in for tender driving and line handling, contributing to the seamless functioning of the yacht alongside the crew. Her ability to work in close coordination with the team makes her a reliable and versatile member of the crew.

crew.name: Danilo Cvorovic
crew.bio:
Montenegrin

Danilo joined the yachting industry in 2020 and has since built solid experience working on both private and charter yachts. Over the past two seasons, he’s worked aboard seasonal boats, developing strong all-around deck skills and a keen eye for detail. Coming from a family with a background in hospitality, Danilo brings a natural sense of service and guest care to every charter. His friendly attitude, strong work ethic, and commitment to teamwork make him a valuable part of the MADRA II crew.
